text:
# Overview of Gen AI & Tooling in Nationwide  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025  
DEVELOPER PRODUCTIVITY  
Use of copilot capability to accelerate tasks within the SDLC lifecycle  
ENTERPRISE PRODUCTIVITY  
MONITORING & GOVERNANCE  
Use case development within the AI CoE for enterprise-grade solutions supporting NBS business units  
AI governance workflow management and model monitoring tooling  
Copilot + ICA on Prem  
Copilot + ICA Off Network (PoC)  
AzOAI, AI Foundry, Federated Build  
Azure OpenAI Services  
Watsonx.Gov  
Microsoft Monitoring MVP + Watsonx.Gov POC  
logo  
Hackathons  
IBM & Nationwide – Gen AI Demo
name: Chunk 4/14

raw_entities.name: Nationwide
raw_entities.description: The primary client organization undergoing a generative AI transformation, leveraging IBM's solutions and tooling to support its internal business units and development processes.
context: Overview of Gen AI & Tooling in Nationwide

raw_entities.name: IBM
raw_entities.description: The technology and consulting partner delivering the Gen AI demonstration, AI governance tooling, and enterprise-grade solutions to Nationwide.

raw_entities.name: Copilot
raw_entities.description: An AI-powered assistant tool integrated with ICA infrastructure to accelerate developer tasks and improve productivity within the SDLC lifecycle.
context: Use of copilot capability to accelerate tasks within the SDLC lifecycle

raw_entities.name: Watsonx.Gov
raw_entities.description: A government-compliant AI platform utilized in proof-of-concept and MVP deployments alongside Microsoft monitoring tools for enterprise governance.

raw_entities.name: Azure OpenAI Services
raw_entities.description: Microsoft's cloud-based generative AI service referenced as part of the broader AI tooling and foundry stack.

raw_entities.name: ICA
raw_entities.description: An internal or partner infrastructure component integrated with Copilot, deployed both on-premises and off-network for PoC environments.

raw_entities.name: Developer Productivity
raw_entities.description: A core operational capability focused on accelerating software development tasks and improving efficiency within the SDLC lifecycle through AI tooling.
context: Use of copilot capability to accelerate tasks within the SDLC lifecycle

raw_entities.name: Monitoring & Governance
raw_entities.description: The ability to manage AI governance workflows and monitor model performance using dedicated tooling to ensure enterprise-grade compliance and oversight.
context: AI governance workflow management and model monitoring tooling

raw_entities.name: AI CoE Use Case Development
aliases: Use case development within the AI CoE
raw_entities.description: The process of developing and deploying AI use cases within an AI Center of Excellence to deliver enterprise-grade solutions that support business unit operations.
context: Use case development within the AI CoE for enterprise-grade solutions supporting NBS business units

raw_entities.name: IBM Gen AI Demo 2025
raw_entities.description: A 2025 demonstration event showcasing IBM's generative AI capabilities, tooling stack, and deployment strategies to Nationwide stakeholders.

raw_entities.name: Federated Build
raw_entities.description: A solution architecture or build approach enabling distributed AI model development and deployment across the enterprise landscape.

raw_entities.name: Hackathons
raw_entities.description: Internal innovation events likely leveraged to explore Gen AI applications, accelerate development, and test new capabilities within the organization.

raw_entities.name: Task Acceleration
raw_entities.description: The operational outcome of speeding up development workflows and reducing time-to-value within the SDLC through AI copilot integration.
context: Use of copilot capability to accelerate tasks within the SDLC lifecycle

raw_entities.name: NBS Business Units
raw_entities.description: The internal business divisions of Nationwide that are the target recipients of enterprise-grade AI solutions and CoE development efforts.
context: Use case development within the AI CoE for enterprise-grade solutions supporting NBS business units

raw_entities.name: Enterprise-Grade Solutions
raw_entities.description: The commitment to delivering robust, compliant, and scalable AI solutions tailored for large-scale business unit operations and governance requirements.
context: Use case development within the AI CoE for enterprise-grade solutions supporting NBS business units
